groups.name: Compton Run Club
groups.description: Weekly runs around Compton. All paces welcome — we start together, finish together.
textPosts: Saturday 7am at MLK Park. See you there 🏃‍♂️
Huge turnout this week. Proud of y’all.
Shoes don’t make the runner, showing up does.

events.title: Saturday Community Run
events.description: 5K loop through MLK Park. Water + bananas after.

events.title: MLK 5K Tribute Run
events.description: Honoring the legacy with a community 5K.

events.title: Compton Half Marathon Prep
events.description: Long run + pace groups for the half.

groups.name: Long Beach Run Club
groups.description: Beachside miles, sunrise sessions, and zero judgement. Run with us.
textPosts: Shoreline run tomorrow 6:30am. Coffee after at Rose Park.
New PRs all around last weekend. Keep going.
Reminder: it’s not about pace, it’s about presence.

events.title: Shoreline Sunrise Run
events.description: Easy 3-mile sunrise run along the boardwalk.

groups.name: South Central LA Run Club
groups.description: South Central miles. Repping the block one step at a time.
textPosts: Put the phone down, lace up. 7am meet at Exposition.
If you showed up today, you’re already different.
Next week we add hills. Consider yourself warned.

groups.name: Be Safe Stay Dangerous
groups.description: Mini bike racing, wheelie culture, and community rides. Safe riders. Loud bikes.
textPosts: Sunday meet at the lot. Full face or don’t pull up.
Every rider comes home. Every. Single. Time.

events.title: Mini Bike Meetup
events.description: Open lot. Parts swap + test rides.

events.title: Community Ride-Out
events.description: Escorted ride-out through Compton — safety first.

groups.name: Earn Your Leisure
groups.description: Young professionals leveling up together. Money, moves, and the conversations your parents never had.
textPosts: If your money doesn’t have a job, it’s robbing you.
Next workshop: Roth IRA for beginners. RSVP below.

events.title: Intro to Investing Workshop
events.description: Brokerage basics, index funds, and why fees matter.

events.title: Real Estate 101
events.description: House-hacking, rentals, and the LA market in 2026.
